zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin William Peyton於1705年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特格盧斯特時，他的父親Robert Peyton28歲，母親Mary Langton26歲。他於1725年與Eleanor Bell Corprew在美國北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1748年12月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州博福特享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin William Peyton于1705年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特格盧斯特时，他的父亲Robert Peyton28岁，母亲Mary Langton26岁。他于1725年与Eleanor Bell Corprew在美国北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1748年12月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州博福特享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Tuscarora War
historicEvents.description: The British, Dutch, and German settlers fought with the Tuscarora Native Americans, from September 22, 1711- February 11, 1715, in North Carolina.
North Carolina is the location of Cape Hatteras, sometimes called the Graveyard of the Atlantic- many shipwrecks have occurred nearby.

historicEvents.title: Becomes a Royal Colony
historicEvents.description: July 25, 1729, North Carolina became a royal colony, when the colony was sold to King George II.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Anchor-Carolina Becomes North and South Carolina

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin William Peyton was born in 1705, in Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Robert Peyton, was 28 and his mother, Mary Langton, was 26. He married Eleanor Bell Corprew in 1725, in North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died in December 1748, in Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin William Peyton est né en 1705, à Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Robert Peyton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Langton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Bell Corprew en 1725, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1748, à Beaufort, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benjamin William Peyton 1705 in Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Peyton 28 und seine Mutter Mary Langton 26. Er hat 1725 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Eleanor Bell Corprew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1748 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America.

Lui sposato Eleanor Bell Corprew nel 1725, nel Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin William Peyton(이)가 1705년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 그루스스터 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Peyton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Langton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1725년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Eleanor Bell Corprew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1748년 12월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 보포트에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin William Peyton nasceu em 1705, em Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Robert Peyton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Langton, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Bell Corprew em 1725, em Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1748, em Beaufort, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin William Peyton родился в 1705 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Robert Peyton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Langton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Bell Corprew в 1725 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер декабрь 1748 г. в местности бофорт, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benjamin William Peyton nació en 1705, en Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Robert Peyton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Langton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eleanor Bell Corprew en 1725, en Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1748, en Beaufort, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America, a la edad de 43 años.
